docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONKLE, SHEILA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IJLSF LLC DBA IT'S JUST LUNCH $4,344.00 PRINCIPAL, $244.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,588.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
